extension.description: Bridge between claude.ai and Claude Code. Export any chat to clean Markdown in one click — auto-attached to Claude Code as context. Needs the Exportal Companion Chrome extension.
command.importFromZip.title: Exportal: Import claude.ai ZIP
command.showPairingInfo.title: Exportal: Show bridge pairing token
command.sendSessionToClaudeAi.title: Exportal: Send Claude Code session to claude.ai
command.importFromChatGptZip.title: Exportal: Import ChatGPT ZIP
command.sendSessionToChatGpt.title: Exportal: Send Claude Code session to ChatGPT
command.switchPairingProvider.title: Exportal: Switch pairing provider (claude.ai / chatgpt.com)
configuration.title: Exportal
configuration.autoAttachToClaudeCode.des: After importing a conversation, open the Claude Code panel and attach the exported Markdown as an @-mention. Requires the official Claude Code extension.
configuration.alsoWriteJsonl.description: Also write a Claude Code-compatible .jsonl alongside the .md so the imported conversation appears in /resume of Claude Code as if it were a local session. Experimental: the .jsonl format is reverse-engineered and may break across Claude Code updates.
